chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5298 of 2023 Javed Iqbal Versus Learned District & Sessions Judge Malir & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 27591/23 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For hearing of CMA 24354/23 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 14.12.2023 Mr. Raj Ali Wahid Kunwar for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel, in view of subsequent order passed in Revision Application, which is independently challenged, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along listed applications. Judge Judge
